molecular_modeling

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void changeVertex(int Id, float x, float y, float z, java.lang.String link)
      Whenever any atom changes its position, this function is to be called to remove atom from its current position and draw it to the new location Managing all the links it has and the information it has in the description.
      static void CleanSceneGraph()
      cleans the 3D canvas or scene graph before reading an existing structure from the file reset every needed settings to completely start a new one.
      javax.media.j3d.Canvas3D CreateGraphics(molecularModeling parent)
      Calls only once after starting the program to create 3D canvas and initial atom and setting up the 3D environment, also register mouse events by calling MouseEvents class.
      (package private) static javax.media.j3d.Appearance createMatAppear(javax.vecmath.Color3f dColor, javax.vecmath.Color3f sColor, float shine) 
      void CreateSphere(com.sun.j3d.utils.geometry.Primitive shape)
      This function used to create atom on the 3D canvas by setting all the required properties, according to the requirements.
      (package private) static javax.media.j3d.TransformGroup createTg(float x, float y, float z) 
      (package private) javax.media.j3d.TransformGroup createTG(float x, float y, float z) 
      private static void DrawHighlighted(int Id, java.lang.String[] InfoData, float size, javax.vecmath.Color3f color) 
      static void DrawLinE(javax.vecmath.Point3f prEvPoint, javax.vecmath.Point3f cuRrPoint, int nextline)
      This function draw a connection or link between two atoms based on coordinates of the two atoms.
      static void enablePicking(javax.media.j3d.Node node)
      This function sets the capability of the 3D elements on the canvas to detect exactly the element when user clicks on it, means intersection.
      private javax.vecmath.Vector3f getXYZcorD(int rAnGE, javax.vecmath.Vector3f poS)
      Assign the coordinates simultaneously while users clicks on the canvas in order to make the molecule first time.
      static void HighlightSphere(int ID)
      Changes the color of the atom when user selects any atom in the main table of the atoms.
      static int lineExistbetween(int id1, int id2)
      This function checks whether the links between two atoms exists or not, if exists return id, if not return -1.
      static void RedrawSphere(int Id, float x, float y, float z)
      Function used to redraw sphere if its deleted or its coordinates changes.
      static void ResetScene()
      reset the molecule to its original position.
      static void rEstScene()
      rest of the setting of the scene when any change occure on the 3D canvas.
      static void setCenterOfMass(float x, float y, float z)
      Sets rotation of the molecule according to the given points or center of the mass while rotating with the mouse.
      static void SetDiscription(int id, java.lang.String Discription)
      To set the discription of the atom or sphere Discription: information about, who its conected to? what its id etc important!.
      static void SetLineArray(int ID, int a, int b)
      Saves the information about the connection b/w two atoms.
      int SphereExistAtLocation(javax.vecmath.Vector3f i_vertex)
      Check whether the atom exists on specified location where new item is going to be drawn returns id of the atom, if the atom exists and return -1 if there is no atom exists before.
      static void undoScene()
      remove the very latest atom drawn on the canvas.

      • createMatAppear

                                                  javax.vecmath.Color3f sColor,
                                                  float shine)

      • CreateGraphics

        public javax.media.j3d.Canvas3D CreateGraphics(molecularModeling parent)
        Calls only once after starting the program to create 3D canvas and initial atom and setting up the 3D environment, also register mouse events by calling MouseEvents class.
        Parameters:
        parent - molecularModeling class reference
        Returns:
        3D Canvas Object
        See Also:
        molecularModeling.StartSceneGraphWindow()

      • lineExistbetween

        public static int lineExistbetween(int id1,
                                   int id2)
        This function checks whether the links between two atoms exists or not, if exists return id, if not return -1.
        Parameters:
        id1 - Id of one atom
        id2 - Id of the other atom
        Returns:
        int

      • SphereExistAtLocation

        public int SphereExistAtLocation(javax.vecmath.Vector3f i_vertex)
        Check whether the atom exists on specified location where new item is going to be drawn returns id of the atom, if the atom exists and return -1 if there is no atom exists before.
        Parameters:
        i_vertex - Coordinates of an atom
        Returns:
        int
        See Also:
        CreateSphere(com.sun.j3d.utils.geometry.Primitive)

      • setCenterOfMass

        public static void setCenterOfMass(float x,
                                   float y,
                                   float z)
        Sets rotation of the molecule according to the given points or center of the mass while rotating with the mouse.
        Parameters:
        x - Position x-axis
        y - Position y-axis
        z - Position z-axis
        See Also:
        molecularModeling.CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent), molecularModeling.centerofmassbtnActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent)

      • undoScene

        public static void undoScene()
        remove the very latest atom drawn on the canvas.

      • enablePicking

        public static void enablePicking(javax.media.j3d.Node node)
        This function sets the capability of the 3D elements on the canvas to detect exactly the element when user clicks on it, means intersection.
        Parameters:
        node - Object
        See Also:
        CreateSphere(com.sun.j3d.utils.geometry.Primitive), RedrawSphere(int, float, float, float), DrawHighlighted(int, java.lang.String[], float, javax.vecmath.Color3f)

      • CreateSphere

        public void CreateSphere(com.sun.j3d.utils.geometry.Primitive shape)
        This function used to create atom on the 3D canvas by setting all the required properties, according to the requirements.
        Parameters:
        shape - Clicked Object
        See Also:
        mouseEvents.mouseClicked(java.awt.event.MouseEvent)

      • RedrawSphere

        public static void RedrawSphere(int Id,
                                float x,
                                float y,
                                float z)
        Function used to redraw sphere if its deleted or its coordinates changes.
        Parameters:
        Id - Id of an atom
        x - Points on x-axis
        y - Points on y-axis
        z - Points on z-axis
        See Also:
        molecularModeling.ReadPMFile(java.lang.String)

      • SetDiscription

        public static void SetDiscription(int id,
                                  java.lang.String Discription)
        To set the discription of the atom or sphere Discription: information about, who its conected to? what its id etc important!.
        Parameters:
        id - Id of an atom
        Discription - Information about an atom

      • SetLineArray

        public static void SetLineArray(int ID,
                                int a,
                                int b)
        Saves the information about the connection b/w two atoms.
        Parameters:
        ID - Id of the connection
        a - Id of one atom
        b - Id of second atom

      • getXYZcorD

        private javax.vecmath.Vector3f getXYZcorD(int rAnGE,
                                          javax.vecmath.Vector3f poS)
        Assign the coordinates simultaneously while users clicks on the canvas in order to make the molecule first time.
        Parameters:
        rAnGE - Direction of the atom
        poS - Position in vector form
        Returns:
        Vector3f Initial coordinates for the atom

      • DrawLinE

        public static void DrawLinE(javax.vecmath.Point3f prEvPoint,
                            javax.vecmath.Point3f cuRrPoint,
                            int nextline)
        This function draw a connection or link between two atoms based on coordinates of the two atoms.
        Parameters:
        prEvPoint - Coordinates of one atom
        cuRrPoint - Coordinates of second atom
        nextline - Number of connectivity
        See Also:
        CreateSphere(com.sun.j3d.utils.geometry.Primitive), changeVertex(int, float, float, float, java.lang.String)

      • changeVertex

        public static void changeVertex(int Id,
                                float x,
                                float y,
                                float z,
                                java.lang.String link)
        Whenever any atom changes its position, this function is to be called to remove atom from its current position and draw it to the new location Managing all the links it has and the information it has in the description.
        Parameters:
        Id - Id of the atom to be moved
        x - New points on x-axis
        y - New points on y-axis
        z - New points on z-axis
        link - Existing links of an atom
        See Also:
        molecularModeling.CalculateGeometryActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent), molecularModeling.addTablelistener()

      • HighlightSphere

        public static void HighlightSphere(int ID)
        Changes the color of the atom when user selects any atom in the main table of the atoms.
        Parameters:
        ID - Id of an atom to be highlighted
        See Also:
        molecularModeling.addTablelistener()

      • DrawHighlighted

        private static void DrawHighlighted(int Id,
                                    java.lang.String[] InfoData,
                                    float size,
                                    javax.vecmath.Color3f color)
        See Also:
        HighlightSphere(int)

      • rEstScene

        public static void rEstScene()
        rest of the setting of the scene when any change occure on the 3D canvas.

      • ResetScene

        public static void ResetScene()
        reset the molecule to its original position.

      • CleanSceneGraph

        public static void CleanSceneGraph()
        cleans the 3D canvas or scene graph before reading an existing structure from the file reset every needed settings to completely start a new one.
